display.name: Search Vector Count Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of searching vectors.

display.name: Insert Vector Count Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of inserting vectors.

display.name: Success Request Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of success requests.

display.name: Go Heap released
display.description: Number of heap bytes released to OS.

display.name: Go Heap in Use
display.description: Number of heap bytes that be used.

display.name: Container Threads
display.description: Number of container threads created.

display.name: Cache Hit rate
display.description: Average cache hits per minute of cache operations.

display.name: Apply Timestamp Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of apply timestamp over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: sum(increase(milvus_proxy_apply_timestamp_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_apply_timestamp_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id)

display.name: Received Byte Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of bytes received  in proxy

display.name: Apply PK Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile of latency for applying PK over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_apply_pk_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", job="$job"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_apply_pk_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_apply_pk_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id)

display.name: Request Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of request over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: sum(increase(milvus_proxy_req_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_req_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id)

display.name: Faild Request Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of faild requests.

display.name: Send Byte Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of bytes sent back to the client by the Proxy in response to a Search or Query request.

display.name: Proxy Node Num
display.description: Number of proxy nodes which has register with etcd

display.name: Timestamp Saved
display.description: RootCoord stores pre-assigned timestamps in the metastore

display.name: Search Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of search request over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, query_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_sq_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type)

display.name: Produced Timetick Time Taken
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency for rootcoord to finish synchronizing timestamp messages to all pchanels.

spec.query:
sum(
  increase(milvus_rootcoord_sync_timetick_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", job="$job", container=~"$container"}[2m])
)
/
sum(
  increase(milvus_rootcoord_sync_timetick_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", job="$job", container=~"$container"}[2m])
)

display.name: DDL Request Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of DDL request over the last 2 minutes.

display.name: DML Channel Num
display.description: The number of DML channels

display.name: DDL Request Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of DDL request

display.name: Timestamp
display.description: RoootCoord current latest timestamp

display.name: Msgstream Num
display.description: The number of Msgstream objects.

display.name: ID Alloc Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of IDs assigned by RootCoord

display.name: Partition Num
display.description: The number of partitions.

display.name: Credential Num
display.description: The number of credential

display.name: Collection Num
display.description: The number of collections.

display.name: Collection Search Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of search request for a specified collection over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, query_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_collection_sq_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance",namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_collection_sq_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_collection_sq_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type)

display.name: Collection Loaded Num
display.description: Total number of loaded collections.

display.name: Load Request Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of load request over the last 2 minutes.

display.name: Load Request Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of load requests.

display.name: Release Request Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of relaase requests.

display.name: Load Task
display.description: Total number pf loading task.

display.name: Release Request Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of release request over the last 2 minutes.

display.name: Query Node Num
display.description: Number of Query nodes which has register with etcd.

display.name: Task Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of task request over the last 2 minutes.

display.name: Collection Loaded Num
display.description: Total number of the loaded collections in QueryNode.

display.name: DML Virtual Channel
display.description: Total number of dml virtual channels for QueryNode watch

display.name: Mutation Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of mutation request over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, msg_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_mutation_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance",namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_mutation_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, msg_type) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_mutation_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, msg_type)

display.name: Segment Loaded Num
display.description: Total number of the loaded segment in QueryNode.

display.name: TimeTick Lag Behind Now (Consumed)
display.description: Average, maximum and minimum values of the  timestamps for time tick behind.

display.name: Search Request Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of searching requests.

spec.query: sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_req_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])/120) by (query_type, status, pod, node_id)

display.name: Consumed Message Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of consuming message

display.name: Queryable Entity Num
display.description: Total number of the queryable entities  in QueryNode.

display.name: Search Segment Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of search segment over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, pod, node_id, query_type, segment_state) (rate(milvus_querynode_sq_segment_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_segment_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type, segment_state) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_segment_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type, segment_state)

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_req_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_req_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type)

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_queue_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_queue_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type)

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_querynode_load_segment_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_load_segment_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_load_segment_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id)

display.name: Segcore Request Latency

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, query_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_querynode_sq_core_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_core_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_core_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type)

display.name: Collection Mutation Latency

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, msg_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_collection_mutation_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance",namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_collection_mutation_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, msg_type) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_collection_mutation_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace", collection_name=~"$collection_name",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, msg_type)

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, pod, node_id, query_type) (rate(milvus_querynode_sq_reduce_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_reduce_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_sq_reduce_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id, query_type)

display.name: Ready Read Task Length
display.description: The length of the task queue of read requests to be executed

display.name: Flowgraph Num
display.description: Total number of flowgraph

display.name: Unsolved Read Task Length
display.description: The length of the task queue for unsolved read requests

display.name: Search Group Size
display.description: The number of original tasks contained in the merged search task

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_querynode_search_group_size_bucket{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_search_group_size_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_search_group_size_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id)

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_search_group_nq_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_search_group_nq_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id)

sum(increase(milvus_querynode_search_topk_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_querynode_search_topk_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id)

display.name: Wait Search Result Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of wait search result over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, query_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_sq_wait_result_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_wait_result_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_wait_result_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type)

display.name: Data Node Num
display.description: Number of data nodes which has register with etcd.

display.name: Segment Num
display.description: Number of segments with different states in the Meta of DataCoord

display.name: Stored Rows
display.description: The number of rows of valid data accumulated in DataCoord that flushed.

display.name: Stored Binlog Size
display.description: binlog size of all collections/segments, unit byte

display.name: Compact Segment Size
display.description: Compacted segment size distribution buckets

spec.query: sum(increase(milvus_datacoord_compacted_segment_size_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_datacoord_compacted_segment_size_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id)

display.name: Level-0 Segment Size
display.description: Sum of Level-0 segment sizes

spec.query: sum(increase(milvus_datacoord_store_level0_segment_size_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_datacoord_store_level0_segment_size_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id)

display.name: Task Count
display.description: Number of ongoing DataCoord tasks

display.name: Index Req Count
display.description: DataCoord total index request count

display.name: Index Node Number
display.description: DataCoord total index node number.

display.name: DataCoord Collection Number
display.description: DataCoord total collection number.

display.name: Reduce Search Result Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of reduce search result over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, query_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_sq_decode_result_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance",namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])))

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_reduce_result_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_reduce_result_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type)

display.name: Channel Checkpoint Unix Seconds
display.description: Latest checkpoint timestamp per channel

display.name: Flushed Data Rows
display.description: DataNode total flushed rows count

display.name: Consume Bytes Count
display.description: DataNode total consumed bytes count

display.name: TimeTick Lag Behind Now (Consumed All)
display.description: Average, maximum and minimum values of the  timestamps for time tick lag behind now.

display.name: Flush Operate Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of flush operete.

display.name: Consumed Message Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of consuming message

display.name: Consumed Message Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of consuming message

display.name: Consume Bytes Count
display.description: Volume of data processed by DataNode

display.name: Autoflush Operate Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of auto flush operate.

display.name: Msg Rows Consumed Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of messages consumed for insert and delete operation.

display.name: Decode Search Result Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of decode search result over the last 2 minutes.

spec.query: sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_decode_result_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_sq_decode_result_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id, query_type)

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by (le, query_type, pod, node_id) (rate(milvus_proxy_sq_decode_result_latency_bucket{instance=~"$instance",namespace="$namespace",container="$container",job="$job"}[2m])))

display.name: Buffer Size
display.description: DataNode foreground flush buffer size

display.name: Save Data Latency
display.description: The 99th percentile and average latency of writte the data in buffer to storage  over the last 2 minutes.

sum(increase(milvus_datanode_save_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_datanode_save_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", container="$container", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by(pod, node_id)

display.name: Flush Data Size Rate
display.description: per-second increasing rate of each message that has been flushed.

display.name: Write Data Count
display.description: per-second count of write data.

display.name: CPU Usage Total
display.description: Total cpu usage of all milvus components.

display.name: Goroutines Total
display.description: Number of goroutines that currently exist.

display.name: CPU Usage
display.description: process cpu usage

display.name: Memory
display.description: Process memory of milvus pod.

display.name: Goroutines
display.description: Number of goroutines that currently exist.

display.name: Cache Update Latency

sum(increase(milvus_proxy_cache_update_latency_sum{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id) / sum(increase(milvus_proxy_cache_update_latency_count{instance=~"$instance", namespace="$namespace"}[2m])) by (pod, node_id)

display.description: Number of bytes allocated and still in use.

display.description: GC Max duration seconds.
